biography.value:
Defense

AC 14, touch 13; flat-footed 12 (+2 Dex, +1 natural, +1 size)

hp 6 [11] (1d10+2) mp 1

Fort +1, Ref +4, Will +2 Defensive Light Fortification

Immune Element of its type, outsider traits except light fortification

Resist Forward element of its type by 50%

Weakness Opposite element of its type

Offense

Speed Fly 30 ft. (average)

Melee Bite +2 (1d6) Spells Known (SC CL 1st; Concentration +1) 1st (DC 11) – wind bomb (aero), ice bomb (blizzard), dark bomb (dark), fire bomb (fire), holy bomb (light), arcane bomb (ruin), earth bomb (stone), lightning bomb (thunder), water bomb (water)

Statistics

Str 10, Dex 14, Con 13, Int 3, Wis 10, Cha 12

Base Atk +1; CMB +0; CMD 12

Feats Improved Initiative

Skills Fly +4, Perception +4, Survival +4

Language Infernal, Abyssal SQ Float, Self-Destruct

description.value: Generated feat from the source statblock: Improved Initiative.
A bombino has the Float (always floating 5 feet into the air) status effect continuously unless unconscious or dead. This effect cannot be dispelled.

contextNotes.text: Continuously has Float and hovers 5 feet above the ground unless unconscious or dead; cannot be dispelled.
Continuously has Float and hovers 5 feet above the ground unless unconscious or dead; cannot be dispelled.

description.value: After each successful physical attack made against the bombino, the bombino increases in size by 1-ft. in diameter (the bombino increases Strength by 2 per physical attack, size increase lasts for 1d6+4 rounds); after the 3rd successful physical attack or reaches 0 HP due to a physical attack, the bomb explodes as an immediate action when reaching its closest target within range, destroying itself and dealing 1d6 points of elemental and physical (half and half) damage to everything within a 15-ft.-radius (Reflex save DC 11 for half damage). Blue mages may learn this ability as a 1st level spell (Knowledge: Planes DC 17).

actions.name: Self-Destruct

effect: After each successful physical attack made against the bombino, the bombino increases in size by 1-ft. in diameter (the bombino increases Strength by 2 per physical attack, size increase lasts for 1d6+4 rounds); after the 3rd successful physical attack or reaches 0 HP due to a physical attack, the bomb explodes as an immediate action when reaching its closest target within range, destroying itself and dealing 1d6 points of elemental and physical (half and half) damage to everything within a 15-ft.-radius (Reflex save DC 11 for half damage). Blue mages may learn this ability as a 1st level spell (Knowledge: Planes DC 17).
Split the rolled total evenly between the creature's current elemental type and physical damage; assign the odd point as the GM chooses.
The creature is destroyed after resolving this action.

effectNotes: Split the rolled total evenly between the creature's current elemental type and physical damage; assign the odd point as the GM chooses.
The creature is destroyed after resolving this action.

contextNotes.text: Apply once after each successful physical hit against this creature; stacks up to three hits before detonation.
Size increase lasts for the listed duration. Detonation destroys the creature and uses the Self-Destruct action.
Apply once after each successful physical hit against this creature; stacks up to three hits before detonation.
Size increase lasts for the listed duration. Detonation destroys the creature and uses the Self-Destruct action.

description.value: Growth stage 1: +2 Strength after 1 physical hit. Use only one growth-stage buff at a time.

contextNotes.text: Advance to the next stage after another physical hit.

description.value: Growth stage 2: +4 Strength after 2 physical hits. Use only one growth-stage buff at a time.

contextNotes.text: Advance to the next stage after another physical hit.

description.value: Growth stage 3: +6 Strength after 3 physical hits. Use only one growth-stage buff at a time.
When struck by a critical hit or sneak attack, there is a 25% chance the extra damage is negated and damage is rolled normally.
